title: sports-registry — authorization policies
description: Three policies — SportPolicy / DisciplinePolicy / PositionPolicy — one per entity. Reads are universal across every tenant role (the catalog is UI reference data). Writes are admin/owner-only + gated by the sports_registry_custom entitlement. Platform-seeded rows are strictly read-only on the tenant plane; every write attempt against them is refused by the policy layer (not just the observer).

abilities.scope: every tenant role. Returns the MERGED catalog — platform-seeded + own tenant customs.
single-row check. Refuses when a Sport carries a tenant_id different from the caller's active tenant (belt-and-braces against cross-tenant leakage; the query scope should already filter it out).
every tenant role. Read-only hypothetical resolver endpoint (sport_key → Sport row).

admin or owner in the active tenant. Also gated by `sports_registry_custom` entitlement — Small + Medium tiers refuse with SPORTS_REGISTRY_CUSTOM_DISABLED (402). Also gated by `sports_registry_custom_slot` — the observer decrements on create + refuses with SPORTS_REGISTRY_CUSTOM_QUOTA_EXCEEDED (402) when the slot is exhausted.
admin or owner. Refused when the Sport is platform-seeded (tenant_id NULL) — platform rows are read-only on the tenant plane. Refused when Sport belongs to a different tenant (cross-tenant guard).
admin or owner. Refused for platform-seeded rows. Refused when active downstream references exist (SPORT_REFERENCE_IN_USE).
admin or owner. Refused for platform-seeded rows.
owner only. Hard-delete on tenant customs only. Refused for platform-seeded rows (PLATFORM_ROW_HARD_DELETE_FORBIDDEN).
platform_admin only. Cross-tenant read.
platform_admin, product or super_admin roles. Creates a platform-seeded (tenant_id NULL) Sport visible to every tenant. Consumes no entitlement slot.
platform_admin, product or super_admin. Update platform-seeded row fields.
platform_admin, product or super_admin. Deactivating a platform Sport hides it from every tenant's picker.
super_admin only. Reseeds the entire catalog from the shipped JSON — support tooling.
every tenant role — merged catalog.

admin or owner + tenant carries sports_registry_custom entitlement. Also validates the parent Sport belongs to the same tenant OR is platform-seeded (a tenant custom Discipline may hang off a platform Sport, but never off another tenant's custom Sport).
admin or owner. Refused for platform-seeded rows.
admin or owner. Refused for platform-seeded + when active Positions or downstream references exist.
admin or owner. Refused if parent Sport is inactive.
owner only. Hard-delete on tenant customs only.
platform_admin only.
platform_admin, product or super_admin. Creates a platform Discipline. Parent Sport must be platform-seeded too.
every tenant role — merged catalog.

admin or owner + tenant carries sports_registry_custom entitlement. Parent Discipline validation: same-tenant OR platform-seeded (cross-tenant parent Discipline is refused with CROSS_TENANT_REGISTRY_REFERENCE).
admin or owner. Refused for platform-seeded rows.
admin or owner. Refused for platform-seeded + when active downstream references exist.
admin or owner. Refused if parent Discipline is inactive.
owner only. Hard-delete on tenant customs only.
platform_admin only.
platform_admin, product or super_admin. Creates a platform Position.
